context: Tests whether the agent builds the useWishlist hook following the skill's patterns for dual auth/guest paths, optimistic UI with error revert, accessible button markup, correct SVG heart states, and context/store-level state management.

checklist.name: userId param branching
checklist.description: useWishlist accepts a userId parameter and, when userId is truthy, fetches from the server (/api/wishlist or similar); when userId is falsy, reads from getGuestWishlist()

checklist.name: DELETE for authenticated removal
checklist.description: When an authenticated user removes an item, the hook sends a DELETE request (not POST or PUT) to the items endpoint

checklist.name: POST for authenticated add
checklist.description: When an authenticated user adds an item, the hook sends a POST request with the item in the request body

checklist.name: Optimistic state update
checklist.description: The toggle function updates local state (items array) BEFORE the async API call resolves — the state change happens immediately on click

checklist.name: Error revert
checklist.description: If the API call fails (catch block or error response), the hook reverts the state to its pre-toggle value

checklist.name: aria-label with product name
checklist.description: WishlistButton sets aria-label dynamically to include the product name AND indicates the action ('Add ... to wishlist' or 'Remove ... from wishlist')

checklist.name: aria-pressed attribute
checklist.description: WishlistButton includes aria-pressed={true} when the item is wishlisted and aria-pressed={false} (or aria-pressed={wishlisted}) when not

checklist.name: SVG fill state
checklist.description: The SVG heart element uses fill="currentColor" when wishlisted and fill="none" (plus a stroke) when not wishlisted

checklist.name: Context or store provider
checklist.description: Wishlist state is managed in a React Context Provider or a Zustand store — NOT stored as local state inside WishlistButton or individual product card components

checklist.name: isWishlisted helper
checklist.description: The hook (or store) exposes an isWishlisted function or selector that accepts a variantId and returns a boolean

checklist.name: loading state exposed
checklist.description: The hook exposes a loading boolean (or equivalent) as part of its return value
